mapper.select: /* JuiceOnlineChkMapper.getJuiceOnlineCnt */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE TO_DATE(EVNT_CHANGE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE-2/24, 'HH') AND TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'HH')

/* JuiceOnlineChkMapper.getSendTargetInfo */ SELECT B.CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.GRP_ID = 'MON0000' AND B.ETC1 = 'Y'
